ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the golf course (e.g., Affiliate, Public) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the golf course is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the golf course is located */,
  "holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes on the golf course */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the golf course */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the golf course */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the golf course */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the golf course */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the course opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the course closed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the course */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility (e.g., Clubhouse, Driving Range) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., Annual, Monthly) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course the member is associated with */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "preferred_tee_time" TEXT /* Preferred tee time of the member */,
  "handicap_index" REAL /* Handicap index of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tee_times" (
  "tee_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tee time */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course where the tee time is reserved */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Scheduled tee time */,
  "reserved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the member who reserved the tee time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tee time (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled) */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the tee time was reserved */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the tee time */,
  "hole_start" INTEGER /* Starting hole for the tee time */,
  "tee_time_cost" REAL /* Cost of the tee time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tee_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tee_times_reserved_by FOREIGN KEY ("reserved_by") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tee_times_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Tournament, Social) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "number_of_registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered participants */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event on the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the member registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., Manager, Pro Shop Assistant) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course the staff member works at */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Member) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., Login, Tee Time Booking, Event Registration) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
